name: Open-Faced Crab Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cheddar cheese into 12 pieces of about 2 ounces each.
2. In a bowl, soften the cream cheese with ginger ale. Mix in the grated onion, Worcestershire sauce, and crab meat until well combined.
3. Split the English muffins in half.
4. Place two heaping tablespoons of the crab mixture on each half of the muffin.
5. Top each with a slice of tomato and a piece of cheddar cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, or until heated through and the cheese is melted.
7. Serve hot.
